data.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's global tariffs. Russell 2000 drops 0.4%, Nasdaq 100 gains 0.5%. Justices question $130B refund. Market split - small caps fall, EM stocks soar. Taxation powers given solely to Congress.
data.description: The Supreme Court struck down President Trump's global tariffs, causing a split reaction on Wall Street. The Russell 2000 fell 0.4%, while the Nasdaq 100 gained 0.5%. The Court ruled that the president does not have the authority to impose tariffs under the IEEPA, emphasizing Congress's power over taxation. The decision raised questions about refunding over $130 billion in tariffs collected. Small-cap companies relying on import duties faced a negative impact. This led to a boost for globally oriented equities and emerging markets. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HauteSheet TV showcases Sonoma County on REAL Shows Network, led by Tara Polley. Airing on RSN from Feb. 20, 2026.
data.description: A series hosted by Tara Polley showcasing the individuals, communities, and companies that shape Sonoma County is being featured. REAL Shows Network (RSN), a TV network focused on enhancing real estate and lifestyle narratives, is behind this initiative.

data.title: White House takes control of stablecoin bill with a smaller, more focused meeting, aiming to bridge gap between crypto firms and banks. Attendees included representatives from Coinbase, Ripple, and Andreessen Horowitz, alongside banking industry representatives.
data.description: The White House is taking a more direct role in stablecoin legislation talks, moving away from industry-led formats of past meetings. During a recent closed-door session, Thursday's meeting at the White House Crypto Council was reported to be smaller and more focused compared to the previous week. Participants included representatives from Coinbase, Ripple, and Andreessen Horowitz, as well as the Blockchain Association and the Crypto Council for Innovation. Notably, there were no individual bank representatives present, with the banking sector being represented by the American Bankers Association, the Bank Policy Institute, and the Independent Community Bankers of America. The White House Crypto Council Executive Director's deputy, Patrick Witt, brought a draft text to facilitate discussions bridging the gap between cryptocurrency firms and banks.

data.title: Inventor from Michigan creates Heat Therapy Mitten (TPL-346) for hand & wrist pain relief. Targeted design reduces pain.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, an inventor from Dearborn Heights, Michigan shared their motivation for creating the HEAT THERAPY MITTEN. Struggling with various hand afflictions, they sought an improved method for heat therapy to alleviate pain. The mitten's unique design is tailored to target pain and swelling.

data.title: AIxCrypto partners with Pinnacle Real Estate Group in Southern California to integrate RWA ecosystem, enhancing real-world asset deployment. (Character count: 134)
data.description: AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIXC) has announced a collaboration with a prominent Southern California real estate group to create a framework for deploying Web2 to Web3 technologies for tangible assets. This initiative, unveiled on February 20, 2026, aims to merge cutting-edge technology with the real estate industry. AIxC, a technology firm specializing in Embodied AI, is leading this partnership, marking a significant step in the integration of digital advancements into traditional sectors.

data.title: Mecademic receives $21 million CAD (approx. $15.3 million USD) funding for global expansion from Investissement Québec and Export Development Canada.
data.description: Mecademic Inc., a prominent provider of compact, high-precision industrial robotics based in Montreal, recently secured a substantial investment of $21 million CAD (approximately $15.3 million USD). The funding round was spearheaded by Investissement Québec (IQ) and saw participation from Export Development Canada (EDC). This financial boost is set to drive Mecademic's innovative advancements in the robotics industry.
